_comment: Manually-maintained native-image resource config (NOT generated by the tracing agent, so it survives agent regeneration). Includes OpenPDF's bundled font metrics (.afm) and localized error-message files (.lng), which native-image does not embed by default and which are needed for PDF output. Without these, BaseFont.createFont fails with 'Cannot load font Times-Roman' and the error message itself is lost ('No message found for 1.not.found.as.resource').
